text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come across a notebook dropped by Trainer
Kiryuin. It's full of detailed information to help
her be a better trainer for Happy Meek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She clearly cares about Happy Meek's struggles
to make progress and makes an effort to put her
first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't shake the feeling that the two aren't
quite seeing eye to eye...
